description: Gauntlet USDC Prime is a MetaMorpho ERC4626 vault that allocates USDC deposits across selected Morpho Blue lending markets, currently a single cbBTC/USDC market at 86% LLTV. The vault is immutable, with no upgrade path; all parameter changes flow through the MetaMorpho role hierarchy (owner, curator, guardian, allocators) under a 7-day timelock. Total deposits stand at {{vaultPositionsTotal}}, sourced from Morpho Blue lending positions priced via Chainlink BTC/USD. Gauntlet operates the owner, curator, and guardian roles via three independent multisigs of differing thresholds.

base:0x5a4E19842e09000a582c20A4f524C26Fb.name: Gauntlet 4/7 Multisig (Owner)
base:0x5a4E19842e09000a582c20A4f524C26Fb.description: The vault owner. Can replace the curator and guardian, add or remove allocators, set the management fee (capped at 50% of yield) and its recipient, and submit a new timelock (1-14 days). All owner actions on capped/timelocked parameters route through the {{ownerTimelock}} delay, during which the guardian can revoke. Controls {{ownerCapital}} in reachable capital.

base:0x9E33faAE38ff641094fa68c65c2cE600b.name: Gauntlet 3/7 Multisig (Curator)
base:0x9E33faAE38ff641094fa68c65c2cE600b.description: The vault curator. Submits per-market USDC supply caps and market removals (both timelocked 7 days) and reorders the supply and withdraw queues. Reallocations are bounded by the existing per-market caps. Controls {{curatorCapital}} in reachable capital.

base:0x7084bF4dB6c21e1834dD6482f6056a39A.name: Gauntlet 3/7 Multisig (Guardian)
base:0x7084bF4dB6c21e1834dD6482f6056a39A.description: The vault guardian. Holds revokePending* permissions over the entire vault and could in principle stall every owner/curator submission across {{guardianCapital}} of reachable capital. Veto-only — cannot initiate state changes, raise caps, move funds, or change the guardian itself; the only action available is cancelling pending timelocked submissions before they execute.

base:0xffD6bF4906a6BCe134B70dd74Afe01c91.name: Gauntlet EOA (Allocator)
base:0xffD6bF4906a6BCe134B70dd74Afe01c91.description: An off-chain allocator bot operated by Gauntlet. Can call setSupplyQueue, updateWithdrawQueue, and reallocate within the curator-set per-market caps. Cannot raise caps or add markets, so capital exposure is bounded by the existing on-chain caps.

base:0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C3.name: Morpho Blue
base:0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C3.description: The immutable Morpho Blue lending protocol, where all vault deposits are allocated as supply positions. Vault TVS of {{vaultPositionsTotal}} sits inside Morpho Blue markets, exposed to its accounting, liquidation, and oracle-consumption logic.

base:0x64c911996D3c6aC71f9b455B1E8E7266B.name: Chainlink BTC/USD Aggregator
base:0x64c911996D3c6aC71f9b455B1E8E7266B.description: Prices the cbBTC/USDC market via the MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 adapter. A faulty or manipulated price could trigger erroneous liquidations or bad debt against the vault's USDC supply. Capital exposure under feed failure is bounded by the market's USDC supply cap.

base:0xA090dD1a701408Df1d4d0B85b716c8756.name: Morpho PublicAllocator
base:0xA090dD1a701408Df1d4d0B85b716c8756.description: A Morpho-deployed allocator contract registered as an allocator on the vault. Lets third parties trigger pre-approved reallocations between markets. No funds at risk on its own — reallocations remain bounded by curator-set caps.

base:0xeE8F4eC5672F09119b96Ab6fB59C27E1b.name: Gauntlet USDC Prime Vault (USDC)
base:0xeE8F4eC5672F09119b96Ab6fB59C27E1b.description: The MetaMorpho vault contract. Holds {{vaultPositionsTotal}} in Morpho Blue Supply positions denominated in USDC, deposited by users into the cbBTC/USDC market. Yield accrues from borrower interest on Morpho Blue.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
